name: Intrinsic Extrinsic
description:
This artwork of six dolls is symbolic of the duality of human persona. There is an intrinsic and extrinsic part in all of us. What we appear may not be as to what we are in our personality. An angry looking man might be really soft hearted and vice versa. The masks that are seen in front of the wooden figures are their inner embodiment. When the masks are removed by pulling the lever, their outer semblance is revealed. 

Rabin Roy completed his B.V.A. from govt. college of Art & Craft, Calcutta in 1997. He has many stellar Durga Puja Pandals to his credit, now recognised by UNESCO. He also has major solo shows to his credit namely Bharat Bhavan (Bhopal, 2015), Akar Prakar Gallery, Kolkata, 2009, Temline Kunstverein, Germany (2001) and many workshops as well. (Kolkata, Delhi, Gangtok)
